name: SmolLM3 3B (No Thinking)
archDisplay: Dense transformer decoder, GQA (4 groups) + NoPE/RoPE 3:1 ratio, tied embeddings; single checkpoint with think/no_think dual reasoning modes
note: Non-reasoning (/no_think) mode of SmolLM3; faster inference, still outperforms other 3B non-reasoning instruct models.
tpsNote: Community-reported estimate for Q4_K_M GGUF inference on RTX 4090 (llama.cpp)
